baseline_guidance: Run each eval with this skill and compare it against a no-skill baseline or previous-version snapshot using the same prompt and inputs.

evals.prompt: Grill me on this redesign plan before I start building.
evals.expected_output: A structured interview that asks one question at a time, gives a recommended answer, checks codebase evidence where possible, and continues until the plan is clear.
assertions: Asks one question at a time.
Provides a recommended answer for each question.
Inspects the codebase instead of asking when evidence is local.
